name: SKINVISIBLE, INC.
summary: Skinvisible, Inc., through its wholly owned subsidiary Skinvisible Pharmaceuticals Inc., is a pharmaceutical R&D company that has developed and patented Invisicare, a polymer delivery system that enhances topical delivery of active ingredients. The company has formulated over forty topical skin products, which it out-licenses globally to pharmaceutical and consumer goods companies, generating revenue through licensing fees, royalties, co-development, and life cycle management services.

products.name: Invisicare
products.description: Patented polymer delivery system that binds active ingredients to skin for extended periods, enabling controlled release in topical formulations without alcohol, silicones, or waxes.

products.name: QRX003
products.description: Topical lotion (4%) formulated with Invisicare, licensed to Quoin Pharmaceuticals for treatment of Netherton Syndrome, currently in late-stage clinical trials.

partnerships.description: Exclusive license agreement granting Quoin rights to certain Invisicare patents; Quoin paid $1M license fee with milestone payments and royalties on net sales.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
